text:
Created attachment 230079
Update to 7.16.1

Link to release notes leads currently to a 404. https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/logstash/7.16/logstash-7-16-1.html

Should contain a fix for the log4j security vulnerability (At least the new Elasticsearch update contains it, https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/elasticsearch/reference/7.16/release-notes-7.16.1.html)
